title: Item > ColumnValue, using alias returns null/empty data
excerpt: The images are self-explanatory I believe, but adding an alias to the text or additional_info field prevents data from being returned (null or empty). Is this expected behavior? additional_info is a JSON type, but t…

posts.author: EricM (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml:
image647×520 16.9 KB

image1183×568 28.2 KB

The images are self-explanatory I believe, but adding an alias to the text or additional_info field prevents data from being returned (null or empty). Is this expected behavior? additional_info is a JSON type, but text like id or title is a String, and they work fine with aliases.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @EricM and welcome to the community!

I can see that you have sent this question to our support team.

Our technical support team will reply using the created email thread so that they can investigate this and give it following to let you know about any news!

I’ll let you continue the flow there

Cheers,
Matias
